summary.atom_clustering: Compatible quote-backed claims can now cluster into shared evidence atoms using scope and concept signatures; duplicate one-claim atoms are removed when superseded.
summary.purpose_gating: Purpose-specific gates reject generic AI/diversity evidence for style/originality and agency/co-creation questions unless required concepts are present.
summary.atlas_trace: Trace previews now include atom cluster maturity, purpose match status, evidence decision, why_clustered, and downgrade/rejection reason.
summary.readiness: Contracts and tests are stronger, but the fixture graph remains thin with many weak atoms and sparse relationships.

atom_clustering_findings: Compatible same-scope claims cluster into a shared atom.
Clustered atom results expose support_count, contradiction_count, qualification_count, source_count, concept_overlap_count, source diversity, and why_clustered.
Maturity promotion works in targeted tests, including clustered maturity.
Committed fixture still has mostly weak atoms.
purpose_gating_findings: Style/originality questions require style, originality, aesthetic, design, novelty, visual, or visual-language evidence.
Agency/co-creation questions require agency, control, collaboration, autonomy, co-creation, authorship, ownership, or human-control evidence.
Generic AI/diversity evidence is rejected for unrelated style or agency questions.
graph_atlas_readiness_findings: Atlas-safe previews include maturity and purpose-fit explanations without private IDs or raw quotes.
Readiness metrics expose weak atom dominance and sparse graph edges.
The current fixture has 15 frontend-ready traces but only 2 relationships for 15 claims.
frontend_readiness_notes: Frontend can consume richer trace/metric fields for honest empty/weak states.
Do not build broad UI yet; graph density and clustered atom maturity remain insufficient for polished Atlas views.

local_model_readiness.notes: Deterministic gates are mock-safe and can constrain local model outputs, but live Ollama was not required or exercised.

paid_api_readiness.notes: No paid-provider path was added, and graph maturity remains too low for paid synthesis escalation.

top_blockers: Fixture graph still has 13 weak atoms and 0 clustered atoms.
Purpose gates are not yet enforced pipeline-wide during source ranking and evidence generation.

verification.command: python -m py_compile rge/modules/purpose_gating.py rge/modules/evidence_atoms.py rge/modules/atlas_trace.py rge/modules/failure_recommender.py rge/modules/run_evaluator.py rge/modules/atlas_snapshot_builder.py tests/unit/test_evidence_atom_clustering_purpose_gating.py

full_verification.reason: No migrations, public card export schema changes, quote validation changes, or source download behavior changes were introduced. Atlas-safe preview changes were covered by targeted tests and full safety audit.

next_recommended_packets.title: Relationship Density Expansion
next_recommended_packets.goal: Create more typed support, qualification, and contradiction edges per cluster and reduce orphan claims.

next_recommended_packets.title: Pipeline-Wide Purpose Gate Enforcement
next_recommended_packets.goal: Apply purpose-fit decisions during source ranking, abstract evidence generation, and full-text claim acceptance.

next_recommended_packets.title: Clustered Atom Fixture Spine
next_recommended_packets.goal: Add or adjust fixture evidence so committed Atlas previews contain at least one truly clustered atom.
